control_rationale: Correctly adopts transactional outbox and retrying publisher, but failure semantics are weaker: no demonstrated in-flight/claim transition, retry exhaustion throws and rolls back transaction, and no explicit dead-letter/state transition or operational checks/tests. Idempotency is only hinted by eventKey. Patch is mostly workable but has avoidable correctness/robustness gaps.
treatment_rationale: Strong complete outbox design: writes order + outbox in same DB transaction, publishes asynchronously with retry and SKIP LOCKED claim, and explicitly covers lost-event and duplicate-event failure modes. Includes metrics and concrete tests, and consumer-side idempotency guidance. Practical and aligned with required atomicity/recovery boundary.
judge_rationale: A improved: it addresses both lost and duplicate delivery paths more completely, includes stronger failure handling, observability, and testing guidance. B is partially correct but less robust and less operationally complete.
